title: Valiant - Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks Addon
description: Currently adds Shadows Arise spell, summon Shadow Warriors and Shadow Mages (capable of spellcasting) to your aid!
body:
Currently adds 1 new spell:

Shadows Arise (Ender School)
Summon Shadow Warriors and Shadow Mages to your aid! The Shadow Mages are capable of spellcasting. This spell may bring you to quite the advantage but it is very costly to cast.


Other additions:

New Clown illager (doesn't spawn anywhere yet, planned for future updates)
New Arcane Zombie (spawns like any other hostile mob, drops arcane essence)

 

 

Have suggestions? Please comment them down!
